mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_img, quantity, unit_price, total_price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImg}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalPrice})

INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_img, quantity, unit_price, total_price) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productImg}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.totalPrice})
